items.title: Improve App Connectivity
items.rationale: 92% of negative reviews mention app connectivity issues, which is the most frequently mentioned topic.

items.title: Enhance Battery Life
items.rationale: 7 out of 9 negative reviews mention battery life issues, indicating a significant pain point.

items.title: Streamline Setup Process
items.rationale: 89 out of 202 reviews mention setup issues, which is a major contributor to negative reviews.

items.title: Improve Customer Service
items.rationale: 42 out of 202 reviews mention poor customer service, which is a significant concern.

items.title: Optimize Accuracy
items.rationale: 53 out of 202 reviews mention accuracy issues, which is a notable concern, especially considering the device's purpose.
